refine_constraint: The answer must be formatted in Markdown syntax with proper use of headings, lists, bold/italic text, and code blocks to enhance readability. The answer must end with a period to ensure proper sentence closure. The agent may take no more than 8 interaction turns to arrive at the final answer.
constraint: (Interact, Round, "At most (The total number of interaction turns the agent may take to answer the question must not exceed 8.)")
